csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_es: Ruta de ID De tipo Flex
Ruta de ID De tipo Flex
Ruta de ID De tipo Flex

csvPropertyValue.csvvalue: Enter Wastage % as a decimal. For example 5% wastage is entered as .05

csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_ja: コンポーネントまたは場所
プライシングオーバーライド

csvPropertyValue.csvvalue: Used to drive automatic highlighting of rows in BOM or BOL. Requires following properties to be set to true to enable feature and visibility of this attribute in BOM/BOL. jsp.flexbom.automaticBOMHighlight=false jsp.flexbom.automaticBOLHighlight=false without the
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_en_us: Used to drive automatic highlighting of rows in BOM or BOL. Requires following properties to be set to true to enable feature and visibility of this attribute in BOM/BOL jsp.flexbom.automaticBOMHighlight=false jsp.flexbom.automaticBOLHighlight=false
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_en_gb: Used to drive automatic highlighting of rows in BOM or BOL. Requires following properties to be set to true to enable feature and visibility of this attribute in BOM/BOL jsp.flexbom.automaticBOMHighlight=false jsp.flexbom.automaticBOLHighlight=false
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_fr: Permet de mettre automatiquement les lignes d'une nomenclature ou d'une liste de tâches en surbrillance. Nécessite de définir les propriétés suivantes sur vrai, pour activer la fonctionnalité et la visibilité de cet attribut dans la nomenclature/liste de tâches : jsp.flexbom.automaticBOMHighlight=false jsp.flexbom.automaticBOLHighlight=false
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_de: Wird zum automatischen Hervorheben von Zeilen in Stücklisten oder in Kapazitätsbedarfsprofilen verwendet. Erfordert, dass die folgenden Eigenschaften auf wahr (true) eingestellt sind, um die Funktion und Sichtbarkeit dieses Attributs in der Stückliste/Kapazitätsbedarfsprofil zu aktivieren. jsp.flexbom.automaticBOMHighlight=false jsp.flexbom.automaticBOLHighlight=false
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_es: Se utiliza para controlar el realzado automático de filas en la LDM o la lista de mano de obra. Es necesario asignar el valor true a las siguientes propiedades para activar la función y la visibilidad de este atributo en la LDM o en la lista de mano de obra: jsp.flexbom.automaticBOLHighlight=false
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_ja: BOM または BOL の行における自動ハイライトの制御に使用します。この機能を有効にし、BOM/BOL でこの属性を表示するには、次のプロパティを「true」に設定する必要があります: jsp.flexbom.automaticBOMHighlight=false jsp.flexbom.automaticBOLHighlight=false
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_it: Attributo utilizzato per guidare l'evidenziazione automatica delle righe nella distinta base o nella distinta di lavorazione. È necessario che le seguenti proprietà siano impostate su true per attivare le funzionalità e la visibilità dell'attributo nella distinta base o di lavorazione jsp.flexbom.automaticBOMHighlight=false jsp.flexbom.automaticBOLHighlight=false
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_ko: Used to drive automatic highlighting of rows in BOM or BOL. Requires following properties to be set to true to enable feature and visibility of this attribute in BOM/BOL jsp.flexbom.automaticBOMHighlight=false jsp.flexbom.automaticBOLHighlight=false
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_ru: Used to drive automatic highlighting of rows in BOM or BOL. Requires following properties to be set to true to enable feature and visibility of this attribute in BOM/BOL jsp.flexbom.automaticBOMHighlight=false jsp.flexbom.automaticBOLHighlight=false
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_zh_cn: 用于驱动 BOM 或 BOL 中的行的自动突出显示。需要以下特性设置为 true 以对 BOM/BOL 中的该属性启用功能和可见性: jsp.flexbom.automaticBOMHighlight=false jsp.flexbom.automaticBOLHighlight=false
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_zh_tw: Used to drive automatic highlighting of rows in BOM or BOL. Requires following properties to be set to true to enable feature and visibility of this attribute in BOM/BOL jsp.flexbom.automaticBOMHighlight=false jsp.flexbom.automaticBOLHighlight=false
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_pt_br: Used to drive automatic highlighting of rows in BOM or BOL. Requires following properties to be set to true to enable feature and visibility of this attribute in BOM/BOL jsp.flexbom.automaticBOMHighlight=false jsp.flexbom.automaticBOLHighlight=false
